playbook.intent: Recurring custom engagement to fixed-scope, fixed-price productized service with landing page, intake form, delivery SOP.
playbook.scope: Convert a recurring custom engagement into a fixed-scope, fixed-price productized service with a landing page, intake form, and delivery SOP that any senior operator on the team can execute without the founder. Exit artifact: shipped productized offer + SOP-driven first delivery + measured unit economics.

success-criteria.criterion: Delivery SOP executable by a non-founder operator
First delivery completed using SOP only

stage.name: Niche the offer
stage.intent: Concrete ICP + outcome + price tier choice.

tasks.task: Pick retainer vs project vs fixed

stage.decision-gate: Advance with a concrete outcome statement + price tier choice.

stage.name: Funnel + landing
stage.intent: Public landing + intake form + A/B baseline.

tasks.task: Build intake form with qualifying questions
Baseline 1 A/B test on price or hero

stage.decision-gate: Advance once landing + intake gets 1 qualified inbound.

stage.name: Delivery SOP + ops
stage.decision-gate: Advance once SOP passes 'an operator can deliver without me' test.

stage.name: First delivery
stage.decision-gate: Required: first delivery completed with SOP only AND margin acceptable.

extra.value: [Full SaaS productization - service stays human-delivered, Multi-product launch - single service per playbook run]
[Recurring custom engagement pattern across 3+ past clients, Bench operator capable of delivering with SOP]
[Founder shadow-delivers and pretends the SOP worked - kills the bench leverage, Pricing in hours - undoes the productize move, Treating landing live as launch - first paid delivery is launch]
['Did the operator deliver without me touching it?', 'Is the pricing in outcomes, not hours?', 'Is margin measured, not just revenue?']

{human: faion get-content productize-one-service-from-custom-to-fixed --format md, agent: faion get-content productize-one-service-from-custom-to-fixed --format context, json: faion get-content productize-one-service-from-custom-to-fixed --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
